name: 中尉雷克斯·克里奇 | 海豹蛙人
nameZh: 中尉雷克斯·克里奇 | 海豹蛙人
descriptionEn: Lieutenant Krikey is a prime choice for all jungle and wetlands combat operations. His expertise in handling wild reptiles big and small has saved both him and his fellow frogmen on more than one occasion. I'm just an apex predator that enjoys meeting other apex predators.
descriptionZh: 克里奇中尉是所有丛林和湿地作战行动的首选。他在处理大型野生爬行动物方面的专长，不止一次拯救了他和他的蛙人同伴。 我只是一个站在食物链顶端的男人，但求一败！
